ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON NOV-22-2005 IN 206, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR ORDER GRANTING PREFERENCE PURSUANT TO CCP 36(D) IS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 02/27/06 @ 11:15AM IN DEPT. 206; SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR 02/17/06 @ 9:30AM IN DEPT. 304. DISCOVERY IS OPEN UNTIL THE CASE IS ASSIGNED TO A TRIAL COURT. PARTIES STIPULATE TO G.O. 140 RE: MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF SHALL DISCLOSE ALL PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AND CAUSATION WITNESSES AS TO DEFENDANT DOVER ONLY BY 12/23/05, AND SHALL ALSO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS THEY INTEND TO USE AT TRIAL AS TO PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY THAT DATE.
